list.title: V4.54c Release Notes
updates: UX Improvements: Renamed certain menus, relocated favorite/save morph button
You can now buy points with Robux.
(supporter+) Bus dot matrix displays have been improved (no more weird effects when zooming out)

list.title: V4.54b Release Notes
updates: Fixed issues with animated morphs, disappearing configurations, and morph sounds.
If this still happens, let us know.
Fixed item deposit machine in the city.
supporterM and above can use btw.
New commands for supporterM: plateregion and customplate
Morph emotes now trigger instantly (for the client)

list.title: V4.54a Release Notes
updates: Added a new map: Legacy lobby

list.title: V4.54 Release Notes
list.description: Points economy updates: they finally have a purpose!
updates: You buy certain amount of uses (e.g. 5 uses of bloxy cola) for points. Each time you activate the item, uses will run out.
New items: Watermelon, Tom's Beans, Hot Chocolate, Smore, Cheeseburger
Fixed prop volume not excluding local player, and morph sounds are now quieter.
Done some improvements to the right panel of the morph GUI.
Fixed the 'void respawn' issue with morphs (e.g. when falling below destroy height)
Fixed issues with tutorial (if there were any)

list.title: V4.53a Release Notes
list.description: Rules GUI improvement. That's it for now! (tiny update yet so big)
updates: Rules GUI - Reduced agree timeout to 4 seconds and removed checking each rule for new players

list.title: V4.53 Release Notes
list.description: Morph saving/favoriting is here! + fixes/other stuff
updates: You can now take or apply someone's morph by clicking on them. The GUI also allows you to report the player.
You can disable copying in the morph GUI > right panel > image settings
Share ID has been replaced with 'Allow Copying' (if disabled, other players won't be able to apply/take your morph.
Nametag configs now save to recent/favorite morphs.
Tutorial has been improved. It will guide you more.
Emote/state sounds limit has been increased to 15 seconds.
Fixed various issues with morph sounds.
Sunsetted certain options from the settings to reduce clutter.
Topbar click effect, Click/notification/error sound IDs, notification style, UI Font weight, etc.

list.title: V4.52 Release Notes
updates: You can now add sounds to sprite states/emotes.
muteradio will mute them as well.
New maps: Backrooms, Content Creator Room
5 new eggs. Collect them while the event is still here!
If you didn't know, when you collect an egg, you earn 15 points.
<s>When morphing into an animated morph, if flashing is detected, the morph will be automatically spoilered to reduce epilepsy.</s>
False positives happened, this was removed.
Spoilered morphs will only show the spoiler button/blur to other players.
Fixed an issue where sliding doors in the city map wouldn't detect morphs.
Fixed an issue with the likes board in the lobby showing incorrect values.

list.title: V4.51b Release Notes
updates: Fixed an issue with auto morph and recent morph configurations not automatically applying after joining in the morph GUI.
Fixed auto scrolling, and improving it so it converts/funnels more players
Fixed an issue where unequipping the behavior card prop would break the text sign editing gui.
Fixed issues with the morph GUI (crop drag, etc).

list.title: V4.51a Release Notes
updates: Added a photosensitivity mode in settings
Animated morphs, signs, and booths will be limited to 2 FPS to reduce flickering and rapid motion.
It now guides you more to avoid confusion.
Switching from static to animated will automatically set the front image to the default state if not configured/empty.
Chat has been fixed - OpenTextChatService reverted to TextChatService.
Pressing save in the configure animation window now closes the window.

list.title: V4.51 Release Notes
updates: Implenented a tutorial feature which guides you through the morph GUI.
Most people find it confusing, this should help them. Let us know if it doesn't.
Fixed an issue where unclaimed booths would leave the 'player's booth' text instead of resetting it.
This might make them easier to find for some.
Fixed an issue where nametag colors/fonts wouldn't save properly.
Fixed an issue where you couldn't morph into CW morphs
Fixed issues with the morph gui and other GUIs
Patched a vulnerability allowing new players to bypass image restictions by using animated image type.
We don't want 'them' to find out about this and shock everyone with bypassed decals...
Fixed an issue where text sign couldn't be editable and eggs couldn't be collected after respawning sometimes.
Fixed issues with the chat window (whispering, etc)

list.title: V4.5a Release Notes
list.description: Bug and user experience fixes. Please let us know of other bugs - we will fix them.
updates: Fixed playtime plummeting down (those who were affected now have it fixed)
Renamed certain options/tabs in the morph GUI (e.g. overhead > nametag, spritesheet > animation)
This might make them easier to find for some.
Added 3 premade spritesheet morphs for new players after this update.
2 of them which were submitted for the spritesheet contest event in the community server - by FortunateBenAlt, CitrusDarling362.
Fixed issues with font dropdowns not initializing in the morph > nametag gui
Fixed an issue where spritesheet auto-detect (when selecting certain marketplace images) got the parameters wrong.

list.title: V4.5 Release Notes
list.description:
Phase 1 of the update everyone's been waiting for...
Stuff like city expansion, new vehicles, transit system, and features/revamps will come in the next phases.
updates: Ends on June 20. Explore & find hundreds of hidden eggs, and earn points!

You can now have animated morphs, signs, and booths! For animated morphs, they support states (idle, walk, run, jump/fall, swim, climb) and emote/action slots.
2 emote slots are free, get more with supporter memberships in market.
You can toggle whether to loop animations, play in reverse, flip, or be pixelated.
For states, you can have stills (1 row and column).
Emotes are activated with the hotbar (toggle between inventory and emotes) with 1-0 keys, just like the inventory.
States and emotes are only for morphs. Idle/default state is applied to sign and booth.
You can also crop sprites (per state/emote) in case adjusting the main parameters isn't enough.

The GUI has been improved. Better scaling across devices, UX improvements, and more.
You can also crop images.
RP Name tab is now called Overhead.
Stroke transparency option replaced with 'Stroke Width'.

Spoiler images (press to reveal)
flip back side of image
and have 1-sided morph (camera-facing/nextbot-style).
Playerlist, audio library pages, changelogs text, Bus displays & IBIS, Adonis Admin logs window

Fly2 command has been restricted to staff due to misuse.
Early-access buses have been restricted to supporter+.

list.title: V4.49z Release Notes
list.description: Probably the last update before V4.5.
updates: The audio library has been revamped.

UI revamp, more features such as recent audios, repeat mode, next/previous, advanced search filters, dragging, minimizing.
The UI also themes based on audio album covers.
The Baconify Exclusives category in the audio library is now searchable and has pagination.
It will also receive more audios over time.
Fixed some false positives with messages/text being blocked.
Stuff like Spanish* or *combine* no longer gets blocked.

list.title: V4.49y Release Notes
updates: Fixed false positives with messages/text/queries being blocked.
Example. 'oh gosh its' and 'get water' would be blocked because they contain a bad word. Should no longer happen
Morphs - crowded areas will lag less. And other stuff.
Added 2 new vehicles: BNS Arc-M5 E60, WV Hatch TDI
Stuff like pit maneuvers are now possible. Collisions may be disabled during certain events hosted by the creator (me).
CLS55: gauge cluster replaced, cluster and buttons now light up when low/high beams are on, instead of when 'running' lights are on.
Done some changes to vehicle performance/tune.
Working on 1:1/close to 1:1 vehicle performance/tune parity, such as 0-100km/h. Some vehicles will be slower, some faster. Not final.
Done some improvements to the morph and menu GUI.
Mainly sizing and layouts, so it's good on mobile and desktop.
Changed lighting style in lobby and city.
Overhead GUI rainbow tags are now a static gradient.
Fixed an issue where certain supporterM commands would make tools invisible.

list.title: V4.49x Release Notes
updates: Fixed false positives with messages/text/queries being blocked.
Example. 'oh gosh its' and 'get water' would be blocked because they contain a bad word. Should no longer happen
Fixed an issue where morphing while flying would result in the morph being wrongly positioned.
Fixed issues with the player list (unresponsive/not loading)
Done some small changes to the city map.
There's now a driving test yard next to the parking lot 2.
They were too big. (notifications, inventory, etc)
Doesn't bring much to regular players other than reports being more effective since it's more convenient for staff.

list.title: V4.49w Hotfix
list.description: Fixes. V4.5 is reserved for a major update. that's why we're doing v.4.49[letter]
updates: Possibly fixed issues with data saving (playtime)
Fixed an issue where favoriting audios and certain audio library features didn't work
I have reviewed Roblox's documentation again. Turns out this restriction wasn't needed.
Fixed an issue where player list badges wouldn't load.
Mainly staff-only vehicles, vehicle sounds, and paint on the RS6 and RS7

list.title: V4.49w Release Notes
updates: Commands can be used without chat on non-keyboard devices.
There's now a button to open the console/command bar on the bottom right.
Modifying RP names/bios, booth text, and text signs no longer require you to chat.
I have reviewed Roblox's documentation again. Turns out this restriction wasn't needed.
Fixed issues with the player list.
The player list now has icons indicating regarding chat restrictions. See below.
About overhead/player icons and hidden messages (roblox's age segregation update):
🔒 and 'Hidden by safety settings' means you and the player can't communicate with you.
🔇 means the player can't chat at all.

list.title: V4.49v Hotfix
updates: Fixed an issue where player data wouldn't save or sometimes load.
Possibly fixed an issue where mute/lock icons wouldn't show on the overhead.
Fixed an issue where the player list becomes unresponsive.
Fixed an issue where 'hidden by safety settings' messages wouldn't show.

list.title: V4.49v Release Notes
updates: Fixed an issue where mute/lock icons wouldn't show on the overhead.
Text sign is now a starter prop.
If you can't chat, you'll have an emoji picker (curated list of emojis, image-based so it's compliant)
Added new props: Question Mark, Gift, Riot Shield, and Money Bag.
Editing the image sign is now done via the morph GUI.
Overhauled first person camera system for vehicles

Passengers can now go into first person mode (V on keyboard, R3 on controller, and a button for mobile users)
Slight improvements (camera moves along with g-forces)
Fixed some issues with the playerlist. Frames are now colored based on the avatar icon.
Fixed an issue where certain number/license plates would show up as placeholders. (US-123-nil)
Done some optimizations to the city and school map.
Playback speed is now limited to 0.8-1.2 to mitigate audio bypasses (chipmunk method)
[Staff] Fixed an issue where the staff room couldn't be teleported to.

list.title: TMP Status Update
list.description: TMP IS BACK ONLINE! Stability & Compliance Patch.
updates: Required to comply with new Platform Safety Standards. Staff can no longer bypass age-gating blocks.
Patched internal systems to prevent future auto-moderation suspensions.
We are working on new items and emotes that allow you to express yourself and RP without text.

list.title: V4.49u Release Notes
list.description: Last update of this year. Issue fixes.
updates: The main event will be from 10:00 PM - 2:00 AM (Polish Time / CET / GMT+1).
Addressed false positives of the filter system
These words shouldn't be blocked anymore: scrapped, simple, etc.
Fixed issues where the RP name would not apply
Not sure if it's actually fixed. Let me know.
Fixed issues with the overhead GUI.
This includes dissapearing morphs, and wrongly positioned morphs.
Preparing for the age-gating updates (forgot to implement it earlier)

Beginning from January 2026, users will be required to verify their age in order to chat, and will be only to chat within similar/close age grouos. The overhead (next to username) will indicate if the user can't globally chat, or can't communicate with you/you can't communicate with them. Messages sent from different age groups will show in the chat as hidden.
If you can't chat, RP Name/Bio and text sign features won't be available.

list.title: V4.49t Hotfix + info
updates: Fixed false positives with the filter system
Morphs and booths won't be affected by lighting
